        norm_num [Nat.mul_mod, ← Nat.mul_assoc] at this; exact this
      exact ⟨n / 50, by rw [Nat.div_add_mod, this]⟩
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl⟩; constructor <;> norm_num [Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_mod_mul_left, Nat.add_mod, Nat.mul_mod]
  have hu : u = 39 := IsLeast.unique h₁ ⟨by rw [hS]; use 0; norm_num, fun n hn ↦ by rw [hS] at hn; obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hn; omega⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := IsLeast.unique h₂ ⟨⟨by rw [hS]; use 1; norm_num, by rw [hu]; norm_num⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    rw [Set.mem_diff, hS, hu] at hn; obtain ⟨⟨k, rfl⟩, hk⟩ := hn; omega⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num
simp [hu, hv]; norm_num

have hS : ∀ n, n ∈ S ↔ n % 50 = 39 ∧ 0 < n := by
    intro n; rw [h₀]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨hpos, hmod⟩
      have h1 := (Nat.mul_mod_mul_iff 2 (7 * n) 23 50 (by norm_num)).mp hmod
      have : (49 * n + n) % 50 = (11 + n) % 50 := by
        rw [Nat.add_mod, ← (Nat.ModEq.mul_left 7 h1).trans (by norm_num), ← Nat.add_mod]
      rw [show 49 * n + n = 50 * n by ring, Nat.mul_mod_right] at this
      exact ⟨Nat.ModEq.add_left_cancel (a := 11) (by rw [this.symm, add_comm]; norm_num), hpos⟩
    · rintro ⟨hmod, hpos⟩; refine ⟨hpos, by rw [Nat.mul_mod_mul_iff 2 (7 * n) 23 50 (by norm_num), Nat.ModEq, hmod]; norm_num⟩
  have hu : u = 39 := h₁.unique ⟨(hS 39).mpr ⟨rfl, by norm_num⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    have h := (hS n).mp hn; rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, h.1]; omega⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := h₂.unique ⟨⟨(hS 89).mpr ⟨rfl, by norm_num⟩, by omega⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    have h := (hS n).mp hn.1; rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, h.1] at *; omega⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

have hS : ∀ n, n ∈ S ↔ n % 50 = 39 := by intro n; rw [h₀]; constructor <;> intro h <;> omega
  have hu : u = 39 := h₁.unique ⟨by rw [hS]; norm_num, fun n hn => by rw [hS] at hn; omega⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := h₂.unique ⟨⟨by rw [hS]; norm_num, by norm_num [hu]⟩, fun n hn => by
    rcases hn with ⟨hnS, hne⟩; rw [hS] at hnS; rw [hu] at hne; omega⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

have hS : ∀ n, n ∈ S ↔ ∃ k, n = 50 * k + 39 := by
    intro n; rw [h₀]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨_, hmod⟩
      have h1 : 14 * n ≡ 46 [MOD 100] := hmod
      have h2 : 7 * n ≡ 23 [MOD 50] := ModEq.of_mul_left (by norm_num) h1
      have h3 : n ≡ 39 [MOD 50] := ModEq.cancel_left (by norm_num) (h2.trans (by norm_num [ModEq]))
      exact ⟨n / 50, by rw [← Nat.mod_add_div n 50, h3]; norm_num⟩
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl⟩; refine ⟨by omega, ?_⟩
      rw [ModEq]; norm_num [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mod]
  have hu : u = 39 := h₁.unique ⟨(hS 39).mpr ⟨0, rfl⟩, fun n hn => by rw [hS] at hn; obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hn; omega⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := h₂.unique ⟨⟨(hS 89).mpr ⟨1, rfl⟩, by omega⟩, fun n hn => by rw [hS, hu] at hn; obtain ⟨⟨k, rfl⟩, hne⟩ := hn; omega⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

have hS : ∀ n, n ∈ S ↔ ∃ k : ℕ, n = 50 * k + 39 := by
    intro n; rw [h₀]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨_, hmod⟩
      have h1 : 7 * n % 50 = 23 := by
        apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num : 0 < 2)
        rw [← Nat.mul_mod_mul_left, hmod]; norm_num
      have h2 : n % 50 = 39 := by
        have h := congr_arg (· * 43 % 50) h1
        rw [← Nat.mul_mod, ← Nat.mul_assoc] at h
        rw [show 7 * 43 * n = 50 * (6 * n) + n by linarith, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left] at h
        norm_num at h; exact h
      exact ⟨n / 50, by rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, h2, Nat.mul_comm]⟩
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl⟩
      refine ⟨by linarith, ?_⟩
      rw [show 14 * (50 * k + 39) = 100 * (7 * k + 5) + 46 by linarith, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]
      norm_num
  have hu : u = 39 := h₁.unique ⟨(hS 39).mpr ⟨0, rfl⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    rcases (hS n).mp hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩; linarith⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := h₂.unique ⟨⟨(hS 89).mpr ⟨1, rfl⟩, by rw [hu]; norm_num⟩,
    fun n ⟨hn, hne⟩ ↦ by
      rcases (hS n).mp hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩
      have : k ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; apply hne; rw [hu]; norm_num
      have : k ≥ 1 := Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero this)
      linarith⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

simp [hu]⟩, fun n hn => by
    obtain ⟨hns, hnu⟩ := hn; obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hS.1 hns
    have : k ≥ 1 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp [hu] at hnu)
    linarith⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

have hS : ∀ n, n ∈ S ↔ ∃ k : ℕ, n = 50 * k + 39 := by
    intro n; rw [h₀]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨_, h⟩
      have : n % 50 = 39 := by
        have h1 : 14 * (n % 50) % 100 = 46 := by rw [← Nat.mul_mod, h]
        have h2 : n % 50 < 50 := n.mod_lt (by norm_num)
        revert h1 h2; generalize n % 50 = r; decide
      use n / 50; linarith [Nat.div_add_mod n 50]
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl⟩; exact ⟨by norm_num, by norm_num [Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_mod]⟩
  have hu : u = 39 := h₁.unique ⟨hS.2 ⟨0, rfl⟩, fun n hn ↦ by rcases hS.1 hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩; linarith⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := h₂.unique ⟨⟨hS.2 ⟨1, rfl⟩, by rw [hu]; norm_num⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    rcases hS.1 hn.1 with ⟨k, rfl⟩
    have : k ≥ 1 := Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr (by rintro rfl; rw [hu] at hn; norm_num at hn)
    linarith⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

simp
        let m := n % 50
        have hm : m < 50 := n.mod_lt (by norm_num)
        revert m hm hmod; decide
      use n / 50; omega
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl⟩; omega
  have hu : u = 39 := h₁.unique ⟨(hS 39).2 ⟨0, rfl⟩, fun n hn ↦ by rcases (hS n).1 hn with ⟨k, rfl⟩; omega⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := h₂.unique ⟨⟨(hS 89).2 ⟨1, rfl⟩, by omega⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    rcases (hS n).1 hn.1 with ⟨k, rfl⟩; have : k ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; exact hn.2 (by rw [hu]); omega⟩
  simp [hu, hv]; norm_num

have hS : ∀ n, n ∈ S ↔ ∃ k, n = 50 * k + 39 := by
    intro n; rw [h₀]; constructor
    · rintro ⟨_, h⟩
      have : (n + 11) % 50 = 0 := by
        apply Nat.mul_left_cancel (m := 7) (by norm_num)
        rw [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mul_add, ← Nat.mul_assoc, ← Nat.mul_mod,
          Nat.mul_left_cancel (m := 2) (by norm_num) (by rw [← Nat.mul_mod, h]; norm_num)]
        norm_num
      obtain ⟨k, _⟩ := Nat.mod_eq_zero_iff_exists.mp this
      use k - 1; omega
    · rintro ⟨k, rfl⟩; constructor; · omega
      · rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]; norm_num
  have hu : u = 39 := IsLeast.unique h₁ ⟨(hS 39).mpr ⟨0, rfl⟩, fun n hn ↦ by obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := (hS n).mp hn; omega⟩
  have hv : v = 89 := IsLeast.unique h₂ ⟨⟨(hS 89).mpr ⟨1, rfl⟩, by omega⟩, fun n hn ↦ by
    obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := (hS n).mp hn.1; have : k ≠ 0 := by intro h; apply hn.2; rw [h, hu]; norm_num
    omega⟩
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num

show 39 % 50 = 39 by norm_num] at h4
    · intro h; constructor
      · rw [← Nat.mod_add_div n 50, h]; norm_num
      · rw [← Nat.mul_mod_mul_left, ← Nat.mul_mod, h]; norm_num
  have hu : u = 39 := by
    refine h₁.unique ⟨by rw [hS]; norm_num, fun n hn => ?_⟩
    rw [hS] at hn; rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, hn]; exact Nat.le_add_left 39 (50 * (n / 50))
  have hv : v = 89 := by
    refine h₂.unique ⟨⟨by rw [hS]; norm_num, by rw [hu]; norm_num⟩, fun n hn => ?_⟩
    rw [Set.mem_diff, hS, hu] at hn
    have : n / 50 ≠ 0 := by
      intro h_zero; apply hn.2; rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, hn.1, h_zero]; norm_num
    rw [← Nat.div_add_mod n 50, hn.1]
    exact Nat.add_le_add_right (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 50 (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr this)) 39
  rw [hu, hv]; norm_num
